title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
title_zh: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
abstract: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing complex tasks.
abstract_zh: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing complex tasks.
tldr_zh: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round
cover_zh: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round
